scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.e2e: npm run db:reset --prefix backend && cross-env DISABLE_PWA=true npm run build --prefix frontend && cross-env CYPRESS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173 CYPRESS_API_URL=http://localhost:4000/api start-server-and-test "npm run start --prefix backend" http://localhost:4000/api/health "npm run preview --prefix frontend" http://localhost:4173 "npm run cypress:run --prefix frontend"
